system_of_record.Confluence: why, what, decisions, standards, operational guidance, learner spec
system_of_record.Jira: executable work, status, owner, acceptance criteria, evidence links

sync_rules: No Confluence operational guide is created without a Jira-backed request or documented exception.
No Jira implementation ticket is Ready for Dev without linked requirement, acceptance criteria, test mapping, risk tier, and owner.
Confluence content changes that affect scope, behavior, risk, acceptance criteria, release readiness, or operations must create/update Jira work.
Jira status changes that alter scope or acceptance criteria must update the living spec and Confluence source page.
Never fabricate Jira keys, Confluence page IDs, approvals, or sync results.
free_tier_fallback: When custom fields or automation are unavailable, put the metadata block in Jira descriptions, use labels, and maintain docs/37-jira-confluence-sync-log.md manually.
